artifacts.summary: Documents exact mathematical gap (forward_F/backward_P for TimelineQuotFMCS) and recommends wiring dovetailed coverage infrastructure to construct temporally coherent BFMCS

metadata.key_finding: The gap is precisely forward_F/backward_P for TimelineQuotFMCS; dovetailed coverage provides sorry-free witnesses that need to be wired to BFMCS temporal coherence
metadata.recommended_approach: Wire DovetailedCoverage theorems to prove timelineQuotFMCS_forward_F/backward_P, then construct singleton BFMCS with temporal coherence
